zh.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien是Duke Otto von Meran III的女兒，於大約1231年5月7日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。她於1244年4月10日與Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III在德國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1272年12月18日享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien是Duke Otto von Meran III的女儿，于大约1231年5月7日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。她于1244年4月10日与Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III在德国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1272年12月18日享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien was born about 7 May 1231, in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France as the daughter of Duke Otto von Meran III. She married Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III on 10 April 1244, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 December 1272, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien est née environ 7 mai 1231, à Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, fille de Duke Otto von Meran III. Elle a épousé Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III le 10 avril 1244, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1272, à l’âge de 41 ans.

April 1244 in Deutschland Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. it.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien è nata il circa 7 maggio 1231 nel Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia come figlia di Duke Otto von Meran III. Lei sposato Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III il 10 aprile 1244, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1272, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranienは約1231年5月7日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンでDuke Otto von Meran IIIの娘として生まれた。1244年4月10日にドイツでFriedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1272年12月18日に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien(은)는 대략 1231년 5월 7일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에서 Duke Otto von Meran III의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1244년 4월 10일 독일에서 Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 12월 18일 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien nasceu aproximadamente 7 de maio de 1231, em Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França filha de Duke Otto von Meran III. Ela casou-se com Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III em 10 de abril de 1244, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Nürnberg-Altstadt: алцтадт унд энгир инненстадт, Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien родилась около 7 мая 1231 г. в местности бесанcон, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Её отца звали Duke Otto von Meran III. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III 10 апреля 1244 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 декабря 1272 г. в возрасте 41 год.
